Item Class: Waystones
Rarity: Rare
Spectre Carving
Waystone (Tier 15)
--------
Revives Available: 0 (augmented)
Item Rarity: +38% (augmented)
Pack Size: +9% (augmented)
Monster Rarity: +37% (augmented)
Waystone Drop Chance: +85% (augmented)
--------
Item Level: 81
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Destructive" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 239(200-240)% increased Critical Hit Chance
Monsters have +24(21-25)% Critical Damage Bonus
{ Prefix Modifier "Frostbitten" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters deal 19(15-19)% of Damage as Extra Cold
{ Prefix Modifier "Shattering" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters Break Armour equal to 30(25-30)% of Physical Damage dealt
{ Suffix Modifier "of Overpowering" (Tier: 1) }
Monster have 101(100-119)% increased Elemental Ailment Application
{ Suffix Modifier "of Buffering" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters gain 12(12-25)% of maximum Life as Extra maximum Energy Shield
{ Suffix Modifier "of Enduring" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters are Armoured
--------
Can be used in a Map Device, allowing you to enter a Map. Waystones can only be used once.
